drawer_content.title: Webistan.Luxury Studio Service Breakdown
drawer_content.intro: We value honesty and transparency. In our estimate, we separate the cost of our developers' intellectual labor from external expenses for third-party services.

base_works.dev: Website Development: Writing 'clean code' (no site builders), mobile adaptation, basic security configuration.
base_works.lang: Multi-language (+30%): Translation architecture creation and technical implementation of language switching.

modules.localpay: LocalPay (1,200 TJS): Integration with Tajikistan's payment systems (Alif, DC, Korti Milli). We configure payment acceptance. Bank transaction fees are paid separately.
modules.ads: Ad Campaign Setup (500 TJS): Professional launch of Google/Meta accounts and audience targeting. You determine and top up the ad budget yourself.
modules.infrastructure: Infrastructure Setup (300 TJS): Technical server preparation, domain linking, and SSL protection. The cost of the domain itself (.tj/.com) and hosting is paid to the provider.
modules.ai: AI (Neuro-Protocol) (1,500 TJS): Implementation of neural networks into site logic. API token consumption is paid to the AI developer platform.
modules.seo: SEO Optimization (500 TJS): Technical preparation of the site so that Google and Yandex can 'see' you.
modules.narrative: Narrative (500 TJS): Creation of a selling story and text for one key section. Each new text idea requires deep processing.
modules.branding: Branding (800 TJS): Development of a logo, palette, and unique visual style.

drawer_content.note_text: All third-party payments (domains, hosting, ad budgets) are your property. We help set them up, but access to accounts and ownership remain with you.

Calculator.support_disclaimer: The first month of technical supervision (Hypercare) is provided complimentary. Regular billing begins 30 days after project launch.
